title: Galactoxylon pierrei

It is classified within the division Magnoliophyta, which includes flowering plants and their relatives. The classification of Galactoxylon pierrei is further refined to the class Cycadopsida, which is a group of extinct seed plants. The classification of Galactoxylon pierrei is an important area of study in paleobotany.
